return(function(z,w,T,K,Q,s,c,p,Y,j,R,b,W,d,Z,f,X,y,h,n,g,r,P)Y,R,X,h,d,r,P,j,f,n,y,b,Z,p,g,W=114721+-114721,{},function(z)for t=-1006802+1006803,#z,20624+-20623 do R[z[t]]=R[z[t]]+(528577-528576)end y(z,{T;K},t,w)end return T end,function(z)R[z]=R[z]-(926506-926505)if-598265-(-598265)==R[z]then R[z],p[z]=nil,nil end end,function(z,t)local w=X(t)local T=function(T,K,Q,s)return end,function(z,t)local w=X(t)local T=function(T,K,Q)return y(z,{T,K,Q},t,w)end return T end,{},function(z,t)local w=X(t)local T=function()return y(z,{},t,w)end return T end,function(z,t)local w=X(t)local T=function(...)return y(z,{...},t,w)end return T end return(W(-955768+7591435,{}))(w(c))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[t(-800276+810934)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
